cards.en: BECAUSE OF — cancelled because of rain / late because of traffic
DUE TO — delayed due to technical issues / due to illness
OWING TO — owing to bad weather / owing to staff shortage
DESPITE / IN SPITE OF — despite the rain / in spite of the delay
BY — by car / by email / by chance / made by hand
WITH — write with a pen / cut with scissors / pay with cash
WITHOUT — without a map / without help / without thinking
INSTEAD OF — instead of calling / instead of me
FOR — for fun / for free / a tool for cutting / it's for you
IN EXCHANGE FOR — in exchange for money / in return for help
IN TERMS OF — in terms of cost / in terms of quality
